title: Astronauts Going to the Moon: Their Special Items
summary: Four astronauts are going on a big trip to orbit the Moon. They are Reid Wiseman, Victor Glover, Christina Koch, and Jeremy Hansen. This is the first time people will go around the Moon in over 50 years. They are all pilots, engineers, and scientists. They also have families and talk about the risks of space travel. Reid Wiseman is the commander and will take a small notepad to write his thoughts. Christina Koch will be the first woman to travel to the Moon. The astronauts are excited and hope this mission helps people live on the Moon someday. They are brave and work together as a team.

a small book for writing notes
a group of people working together

background_read: This article is about the Artemis II mission, where astronauts are going to orbit the Moon. It's an exciting space adventure that hasn't happened in a long time. The astronauts are from NASA and Canada, and they have important jobs like flying and science. They also have families and talk about staying safe. Learning about space missions helps us understand how people explore new places.
Article_Structure: WHO: Four astronauts: Reid Wiseman, Victor Glover, Christina Koch, and Jeremy Hansen
WHAT: They are going to orbit the Moon and take personal items like a notepad
WHERE: The mission is to the Moon, starting from Earth
WHY: To test the path for future missions and help people live on the Moon someday

perspectives.description: The astronauts are brave for going on a risky space mission while thinking about their families.
